final:
module four_bit_counter (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (en) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
